entries.prompt:
A male human Enchanter wizard, head-and-shoulders portrait facing forward. Long midnight-violet hooded robe with silver rune embroidery along the collar, calm composed face, short dark hair, glowing pale-lavender eyes, holding a small floating violet enchantment glyph beside his temple. Painted 16-bit SNES JRPG pixel art style, clean black outline, soft cel shading, transparent background.

POSE (portrait): Head-and-shoulders bust shot, three-quarter view. Long midnight-violet hooded robe with silver rune embroidery along the collar, calm face, short dark hair, glowing pale-lavender eyes, holding a small floating violet enchantment glyph beside his temple.
